name: HMS HDML 1390 (ML 1390)
events: 15 Apr 1945 HMS Unshaken (Lt. J.S. Pearce, RNR) shifted from Portsmouth to Newhaven to assist in A/S training for trawlers from that port. She was escorted by HMS HDML 1390 (T/Lt. W.J. Dowding, RNVR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
